summary:
FableMultiAssets2 (v3.4) is a multi-asset CFD research workspace over the IC Markets 37-instrument universe (21 FX, 4 crypto, 6 index CFDs, 6 commodities; 1m bid/ask feed 2020-2025, bar stamps in broker SERVER time GMT+2/+3, daily break at hour 0 = 17:00 ET). Alpha lives in independent sleeves, each exposing make_positions() that returns an hourly matrix of signed notional exposure as a fraction of joint account equity, decided at bar t and held over t+1. The shipped v3.4 book = 8 seats: 7 home-grown sleeves (meanrev 0.110, carry_breakout 0.046, seasonal 0.180, intraday 0.168, crisis 0.100, trend_v2 0.042, crypto_smart 0.130) + one imported overlay (mag_xau 0.050, ported from NewStrategyFable5, lives in research/ext_import/ not research/sleeves/). Weights are F3-capped conviction weights summing to 0.826 — the freed weight is CASH-PARKED, never renormalized. GLOBAL_SCALE=10.0 (v3.4 re-pick from 11 by pre-committed rule: smallest scale in {9,10,11} with negQ<=1 AND CAGR>=85%). Two stress-validated hard limits are applied to the final scaled matrix: overnight (server hours 21-23,0-5) |XAUUSD| <= structural gold cap = seasonal_weight x scale = 0.18x10 = 1.80xE, and |EURCHF/EURSEK/EURNOK/AUDNZD| <= 0.5xE at all times (ensemble.apply_hard_limits).

Two-tier engine discipline: iterate on the fast vectorized hourly simulator (core.simulate) and the hourly single-account engine (account_engine.py), but EVERY shipped number comes from the true 1-minute single cross-margined account engine (research/account_engine_1m.py). That engine runs the combined book quarter-by-quarter (2020Q1..2025Q4) on the union 1m grid of all traded instruments, chaining balance/lots/entry across chunks. Per minute it: applies swaps at the first minute >= server midnight (weekend multipliers via NewStrategyFable5 engine/costs.py curves), sizes desired lots per instrument as tgt-fraction x joint balance / (price x contract x EURquote), floors to lot_step/min_lot, proportionally shrinks ALL positions if total required margin > 0.9 x balance (margin_cap), executes fills at the minute's bid/ask OPEN crossing the full spread with EUR3.25/lot/side commission on FX+metals (0 on index/crypto), skips same-sign rebalances within a 25% band, marks a co-timed close equity (bid_c/ask_c) and worst equity (bid_l for longs / ask_h for shorts), and fires a joint stop-out closing everything at worst marks if worst equity < 0.5 x margin_used. MaxDD = max over minutes of (running peak of close-equity − worst-equity)/peak — the "worst-mark DD". The hour-h hourly target is mapped to hour h+1's minutes (prev_hour = floor(minute,h) − 1h), guaranteeing >=1-minute causal gap.

Official v3.4 pin: research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json produced by research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py — CAGR +88.66%, worst-mark MaxDD 21.67%, Sharpe 1.854, 0 negative years, 1 negative quarter (2023Q1 −1.42%), EUR10k -> EUR449,708, 20,403 trades, worst-mark 30%-DD breach probability 0.1208 (house bootstrap: stationary 20d-block, 5000 paths, seed 20260709, resampling daily close returns jointly with each day's co-timed worst/close dip factor). The sleeve registry records 9 original sleeves (7 shipped + trend and xsec_fx KILLED), plus 6 later hunt sleeves also in research/sleeves/ and all killed/shelved: session_flow, lead_lag, statarb (v1.3 kills), xsec_reversion, reversion_intraday, range_fade (v1.6 chop-hunt, not integrated; xsec_reversion re-declined at v3.3). All sleeve entry/exit rules, frozen parameters, and the new-sleeve interface contract are itemized in key_facts.
key_facts: SHIPPED CONFIG (authoritative: /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/strategy_fable.py lines 60-110): SLEEVE_WEIGHTS = {meanrev 0.110, carry_breakout 0.046, seasonal 0.180, intraday 0.168, crisis 0.100, trend_v2 0.042, crypto_smart 0.130, mag_xau 0.050} (sum 0.826, freed weight cash-parked, NEVER renormalized); ENGINE_MODEL='single'; GLOBAL_SCALE=10.0 (v3.4, re-picked from 11 on 2026-07-10 by pre-committed rule in docs/v3.4/PREREGISTRATION.md).

1M ENGINE MECHANICS (research/account_engine_1m.py): single cross-margined EUR account, initial EUR10,000; quarters pd.period_range('2020Q1','2025Q4') run as chunks on the union 1m grid of traded symbols + EUR conversion crosses; state (balance, lots, entry px) chained across chunks; numba njit _run_chunk per-minute loop order = (1) swap accrual at first minute >= server midnight [swap_annual_pct/100/365 x swap_day_multiplier x |lots| x contract x mid_open x EURquote; triple-Wed FX, triple-Fri indices, daily crypto], (2) desired lots = tgt_fraction x balance / (ask_o-if-long-else-bid_o x contract x eurq), floored to lot_step (skip if < min_lot), (3) margin check: if sum(|desired| x unit / leverage) > balance x margin_cap(0.9) shrink ALL proportionally, (4) fills at minute OPEN bid/ask crossing full spread; commission_side per lot per side (EUR3.25 FX+metals, 0 index/crypto); rebalance_band=0.25 skips same-sign changes with |want-lots|/|lots| <= 0.25; partial closes realize (px-entry) pnl, adds average entry, (5) co-timed marks: eq_close = balance + sum (bid_c or ask_c − entry) x lots x contract x eurq; eq_worst uses bid_l (longs) / ask_h (shorts); margin_used at close mid, (6) joint stop-out if eq_worst < stop_out_level(0.50 from NewStrategyFable5 config.settings.ACCOUNT) x margin_used → close ALL at worst marks with commission.

WORST-MARK DD (account_engine_1m.simulate_account_1m lines 287-289): metrics computed on close-equity curve; then maxdd overridden as max over all minutes of (running-peak-of-close-equity − worst-equity)/peak. Positions with no bar that minute persist (has_bar mask).

CAUSALITY IN 1M ENGINE (lines 264-267): target held over each minute = hourly pos row of the PREVIOUS hour (prev_hour = grid.floor('h') − 1h; reindex method=None, NaN→0), so hour-h signal executes at hour h+1's first traded minute's open — >=1-minute causal gap.

LEVERAGE / MARGIN MODEL: per-instrument ESMA leverage from NewStrategyFable5/config/settings.py INSTRUMENTS — FX majors 30x, FX crosses 20x, XAUUSD 20x, XAGUSD 10x, indices 20x, oil/gas 10x, crypto 2x; margin_cap 0.9 of balance (proportional de-gross), stop_out 0.50 of required margin, min_lot/lot_step 0.01 typical, contract sizes per instrument; account ccy EUR; EUR conversion per-minute via _EUR_CROSS mid closes {USD:EURUSD, JPY:EURJPY, GBP:EURGBP, CHF:EURCHF, NZD:EURNZD, CAD:EURCAD, NOK:EURNOK, SEK:EURSEK}.

HARD LIMITS ENFORCEMENT (research/ensemble.py lines 53-82): structural_gold_cap(weights, scale, primary='seasonal') = weights['seasonal'] x scale (v3.4: 0.18x10=1.80xE — a RULE, self-adjusts, clips multi-sleeve gold stacking only); apply_hard_limits(pos_scaled, gold_cap, cross_cap=0.5) does pointwise causal clip on the FINAL scaled matrix: EURCHF/EURSEK/EURNOK/AUDNZD clipped to ±0.5 at ALL hours; XAUUSD clipped to ±gold_cap only on rows with hour >= 21 or hour < 6 (overnight, server time). Enforced identically in research and by the live EA (machine spec research/outputs/guards_config.json).

COMBINE (ensemble.combine): tot = sum over sleeves of pos x weight x scale, fill_value=0, NO normalization by weight sum. Fitness F = Sharpe x (CAGR/MaxDD) x (1 − negQ/24) x (1 − mean_abs_corr) x psi, psi=0.1 if any negative year (core.compute_metrics lines 255-258).

GATES (core.compute_metrics, revised 2026-07-09): cagr >= 0.80, maxdd < 0.30 (hard not-to-breach ceiling), sharpe > 2.0 (aspirational, book ships at 1.85 failing it), neg_years == 0, neg_quarters <= 1. NOTE: v3.4 scale-pick rule used CAGR >= 85% (preregistration), not the 80% metric gate.

OFFICIAL v3.4 PIN (research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json): CAGR 0.88659, maxdd 0.21675 (worst-mark), Sharpe 1.85432, final_equity EUR449,707.75, n_trades 20,403, negY 0, negQ 1 (2023Q1 −0.014242), yearly: 2020 +127.6%, 2021 +136.6%, 2022 +32.1%, 2023 +76.9%, 2024 +80.5%, 2025 +86.7%; breach_close 0.0932, breach_worst 0.1208, median_dd_worst 0.2342, p95_dd_worst 0.3353; embedded v2-curve validation breach_close 0.0608 / breach_worst 0.0782.

BOOTSTRAP BREACH VALIDATOR (eval_v34_pin_s10.worst_mark_breach, lines 45-74): daily close equity dc = curve['equity'].resample('1D').last(); daily worst dip factor dip = (daily min of worst-curve)/dc; stationary bootstrap (Politis-Romano) on daily returns r with continue-prob 1−1/20 (mean block 20d), 5000 paths, seed 20260709, wrap-around (j+1)%T; per path eq_close = cumprod(1+r[ix]); dd_close from running peak; eq_worst = eq_close x dip[ix] (co-timed same-day dip resampled with its return); breach = P(max dd > 0.30). Exact procedure from research/rederive_claimA.py.

FULLER VALIDATION BATTERY (research/validate_v1_4.py): (1) stationary bootstrap 10,000 paths ~20d blocks on daily returns of outputs/v1_2_curve.parquet (STALE: v1.2-era scale-10 curve, not v3.4 pin) → CAGR/Sharpe/MaxDD percentiles + P(maxDD>30%), P(Sharpe<1), P(CAGR<0); (1b) scale sweep 6-10 by rescaling daily returns x s/10, 4000 paths; (2) Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey/Lopez de Prado): PSR with skew/kurtosis correction, E[max SR] over N in {50,100,200} trials, trial-Sharpe list hardcoded (7 shipped + 5 killed sleeves + 8 allocator variants). RNG seed 20260709. Writes outputs/v1_4_validation.json. Reads relative path — must run with cwd=research/.

WALK-FORWARD/CPCV (research/walkforward_cpcv.py): tests the ALLOCATION not sleeves; expanding-window quarterly min-variance refit (>=504d train) applied OOS vs frozen weights (ROBUST if WF Sharpe > 0.8 x frozen); purged combinatorial CV: 8 blocks, 2 test, purge 10d, ridge-regularized long-only min-var (_minvar_ridge), reports OOS Sharpe distribution over 28 folds. Reads outputs/final_config.json + outputs/sleeve_daily_returns.parquet (v1 frozen weights, relative paths, cwd=research/). Writes outputs/walkforward_cpcv.json.

SLEEVE meanrev (research/sleeves/meanrev.py): (a) FX leg on 10 crosses [AUDNZD,EURCHF,EURGBP,EURSEK,EURNOK,AUDCAD,NZDCAD,CADCHF,EURCAD,EURNZD]: z=(px−SMA60d)/SD60d hysteresis state machine, enter short z>2.25 / long z<−2.25, exit |z| crossing 0.75; (b) index leg on all 6 indices: long-only dip-buy when 5d vol-scaled return z < −1.5 while px > 200d MA, exit z>0 or 10d max hold. Sizing K=0.07/vol30d (floor 5%), size FROZEN at entry, |pos|<=1, gross<=3, exec lag 14h (13:00 stamp). DEV/HOLD/FULL Sharpe 0.96/0.92/0.95.

SLEEVE carry_breakout (research/sleeves/carry_breakout.py): CARRY: 21 FX pairs, direction=sign(policy-rate differential) when |diff|−1.2%/yr markup > 0.5%/yr, top-5 pairs by net carry, gated by 63d momentum sign agreement, inverse-vol 0.02/vol; BREAKOUT: LONG-ONLY Donchian ensemble on [XAUUSD,XAGUSD,XBRUSD,XTIUSD,XNGUSD,DAX,JP225,UK100,US30,USA500,USTEC] (XPTUSD excluded, 27bp spread): hourly close > prior n-day high (n=20 and 40, x24 bars), exit close < prior 0.4n-day low or chandelier (highest close since entry − 3.0 x ATR20d), size frozen at entry 0.02/max(vol30,0.05). Books combined W_CARRY=1.35 / W_BK=2.05 (~30/70 risk), gross cap 3. DEV/HOLD 0.63/0.88.

SLEEVE seasonal (research/sleeves/seasonal.py): single instrument XAUUSD, long-only clock trade: hold bar returns for hours {23, 0..5} (server-hour grid; window starts after the 22:00 swap roll → ZERO swap; Friday entry held over weekend to Monday reopen). Sizing w = min(1, 0.15/max(vol30d_EWMA,0.05)). 5 frozen params: entry_hour 23, end_hour 6, kappa 0.15, vol_floor 0.05, span 30d. DEV/HOLD Sharpe 0.81/1.48. Largest weight in book (0.18); drives the structural gold cap.

SLEEVE intraday (research/sleeves/intraday.py): USA500+USTEC only, NY open-drive continuation: signal at server row 16 (bar covering 9:30 ET open) = close[16]/close[15] − 1, z = move / (EWMA60d of |move|, lagged 1d), clipped ±2 then /2 → [−1,1]; position = z x min(1, 0.15/vol30d(lag 1d)) x 1.111, held rows 16-20, flat from row 21 → zero swap, no overnight risk. DEV/HOLD 0.87/0.62.

SLEEVE crisis (research/sleeves/crisis.py): stress-gated. Equity stress S_eq = EWM3d of [(10d/60d vol ratio of equal-weight 6-index basket > 1.25) OR (basket > 5% below 126d peak)]; FX stress S_fx = EWM3d of [(JPY-cross basket AUDJPY/NZDJPY/CADJPY 10d/60d vol ratio > 1.20) AND basket < 50d MA]. Legs: long XAUUSD = S_eq x (gold>50dMA) x 0.30/slow_vol(EWM250d, floor 5%); short each JPY cross = −S_fx x (0.25/3)/slow_vol. Positions rounded to 0.02 grid (hysteresis), |pos|<=1, gross<=3, effective next day 13:00 (lag 14h). DEV/HOLD 0.40/0.50 (insurance seat).

SLEEVE trend_v2 (research/sleeves/trend_v2.py): TSMOM on [XAUUSD,XAGUSD,XBRUSD,XTIUSD,XNGUSD]; z_L=(P/P_shift(L)−1)/(sigma_d sqrt(L)) for L in (15,25,40,65,95,125) trading days, s = mean tanh(z_L/1.0) x fraction-of-legs-agreeing (consensus gate), soft deadband S0=0.15: s=sign(s)max(|s|−0.15,0)/0.85; sizing s x min(0.085/ann_vol(EWMA20d),1), XAGUSD risk halved; hysteresis: retrade only if |target−held| > 0.15 x per-asset max weight; exec 05:00 (lag 6h). DEV/HOLD 0.42/0.14 (weak diversifier).

SLEEVE crypto_smart (research/sleeves/crypto_smart.py): BTC/ETH/SOL (XRP excluded 169bp spread), asymmetric momentum: z = log(P/P_28d) / (EWMA30d daily vol x sqrt(28)); enter long z>=0.75; enter short z<=−0.25 AND P<MA120d; exit long z<0.35x0.75; exit short z>−0.35x0.25 or P>MA120; sizing |w|=min(0.5, 0.065/ann_vol); effective 08:00 next day (lag 9h). Rationale: longs pay −20%/yr financing, shorts pay zero. DEV/HOLD 1.26/0.30.

SLEEVE mag_xau (research/ext_import/mag_xau.py, v3.0 import from NewStrategyFable5 hunt): gold $100 round-number magnet — LONG XAUUSD while prior daily mid sits 3%-18% of $100 BELOW nearest $100 round level (dist=(d−round(d/100)x100)/100; signal = dist<−0.03 & dist>−0.18); sizing 0.15/(20d daily-ret std x sqrt(252)) capped 6x; one-day causal shift via core.to_hourly(lag_hours=1). ~18-22% active. Lag-fragile (lag+1d halves edge — on slippage watch). Weight 0.05.

KILLED SLEEVES (docs/REGISTRY.md lines 14-27): trend (cross-asset TSMOM 21d/126d tanh z0=1.5 band 0.10, commodities+crypto) KILLED — 88% DEV→HOLD decay (0.98→0.11), pnl 84% crypto; xsec_fx (G8 cross-sectional FX momentum lookbacks 84/126/168wd skip 5, top/bottom-3, cost-weighted min-norm pair routing, weekly) KILLED — DEV −0.02/HOLD −0.56, swap markup structurally negative; session_flow (US-index 8:30-ET fade z>2 rows 15→16..19 + 14:00-ET follow z>1.5 rows 21→22-23) KILLED v1.3 — DEV 1.36→HOLD 0.18; lead_lag (gold z-scored 1d return → next-day 8-follower USD-complex basket, EXEC_HOUR 3, GROSS 0.18) KILLED v1.3 — HOLD −0.82, inverted by 2024 central-bank gold buying; statarb (vol-balanced spread MOMENTUM |z|>=2 on USTEC/US30 + XAU/XAG, z_win 288h, k=0.13) KILLED v1.3 — HOLD −0.43; xsec_reversion (fade |z|>=2.75 8h-rel-move of G7 ccy vs USD basket, vol-regime gate pct>=0.40, max_hold 48h) shelved v1.6, re-DECLINED v3.3 (2015-19 gauntlet: chop years pay, trend years bleed); reversion_intraday (fade Asia move-from-open at server hour 8 on EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDCHF/EURGBP/EURCHF, exit hour 20, z0=1, dead 0.4) shelved v1.6 — lag-fragile; range_fade (10d z-fade gated by 60d Kaufman ER<0.15 + breadth n0=5, 8-member param ensemble) killed v1.6 — FULL Sharpe 0.39 < 0.7 bar.

SLEEVE INTERFACE CONTRACT: (1) module in research/sleeves/ (sys.path bootstrap to import core); (2) expose make_positions(**frozen_params) -> pd.DataFrame indexed EXACTLY on core.universe_frames(tuple(core.ALL))['ret'].index (hourly union grid, server-time stamps), columns ⊂ core.ALL, values = signed notional/equity decided at bar t held over t+1; strictly causal (daily signals mapped via core.to_hourly(daily, hidx, lag_hours) which shifts to d+1 00:00 + (lag−1)h then ffills; truncation test = rebuild with data_end cut must be bit-identical); (3) conventions: per-instrument |pos| <= 1 (0.5 crypto), sleeve gross <= 3.0 (mandated), sized to ~10-12% ann standalone vol on DEV, <= 6 free params tuned ONLY on DEV (<= 2023-12-31), hypothesis pre-registered in the docstring, HOLD (2024-25) evaluated once; avoid trading server hours 21-23/0 (rollover spread blowout); (4) __main__ block writes research/outputs/{NAME}_pos.parquet + {NAME}_report.json (hypothesis/params/DEV-HOLD-FULL metrics/per-symbol pnl/sensitivity/turnover cost share); (5) integration: ensemble.load_sleeves reads outputs/{name}_pos.parquet, reindexes to grid, fillna(0); add weight to strategy_fable.SLEEVE_WEIGHTS; official numbers require the eval-pin path (combine x scale → apply_hard_limits → simulate_account_1m).

FAST SIM (core.simulate): vectorized hourly proxy; held = pos shifted 1 bar; costs on |Δpos| x (rel_spread/2 + commission_frac); swap accrual matrices on hourly grid at server-midnight rollover (rate lookups floored at 2019-11-01); returns clipped ±0.30 (bad ticks), bar_ret clipped >= −0.95; ~60x faster and ~7% CAGR-optimistic vs 1m truth; hourly worst-mark DD conservative (sum-of-worst) vs co-timed 1m. Screening only — never quote.

DATA: sleeves read research_cache/*_1h.parquet (hourly mid OHLC + rel_spread, built by prep_data.py from NewStrategyFable5/cache/bars_1m_ic); 1m engine reads NewStrategyFable5/cache/bars_1m_ic/{SYM}_IC_1m.parquet directly (fields bid_o, ask_o, bid_c, ask_c, bid_l, ask_h); hourly account engine reads research_cache/exec/*_1h_exec.parquet. core.py hardcodes FRAMEWORK=/Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/NewStrategyFable5 on sys.path and imports config.settings + engine.costs from it (execution spec/cost curves only).

PIN HISTORY / SCALE FRONTIER (all 1m-pinned): v1.1 scale 6 CAGR 67.8%/DD 16.1%; v2 (7 capped sleeves @ s9 + hard limits) outputs/v2_pin_1m.json CAGR +70.9%/DD 19.9%/Sharpe 1.76/negQ 2; C2=v2+mag: s9 c2_pin_1m.json 79.4%/19.9%/1.88/negQ 1/breach 0.061; s11 c2_s11_pin_1m.json 99.9%/23.2%/1.86/negQ 2/breach 0.198; s12 exists (c2_s12_pin_1m.json); v3.4 s10 ADOPTED 88.7%/21.7%/1.85/negQ 1/breach 0.121. Sharpe ~1.85 leverage-invariant across scales.

ENVIRONMENT: python3 = /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniforge/base/bin/python3 with numba 0.64.0, pandas 2.3.3; deps numpy/pandas/numba/scipy/pyarrow. Pin scripts hardcode HERE=/Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2 so cwd-independent; validate_v1_4.py and walkforward_cpcv.py use RELATIVE paths (must run from research/).
architecture: Layered pipeline (docs/CODE_MAP.md): DATA — prep_data.py collapses the IC 1m bid/ask feed into hourly mid caches (research_cache/*_1h.parquet) and build_exec_bars.py into hourly bid/ask exec bars; the 1m engine bypasses both and reads raw 1m parquets from NewStrategyFable5/cache/bars_1m_ic. SIGNAL — each sleeve module (research/sleeves/*.py, plus research/ext_import/mag_xau.py) exposes make_positions() returning an hourly signed fraction-of-equity matrix on the shared union grid; run as __main__ it freezes its own {name}_pos.parquet + report. PORTFOLIO — ensemble.load_sleeves + ensemble.combine (position-level weighted sum x GLOBAL_SCALE, weights NOT renormalized), then ensemble.structural_gold_cap + ensemble.apply_hard_limits (overnight-gold cap 1.80xE + 0.5xE managed-cross cap) on the final scaled matrix. Dynamic overlays (vol targeting, DD throttle, quarter throttle) exist in ensemble.py but were tested and REJECTED — the shipped book is static. ENGINE — three tiers: core.simulate (vectorized hourly screening proxy), account_engine.py (numba hourly single cross-margined account on exec bars, used for sweeps/stress), account_engine_1m.py (true 1m single account, quarter-chunked with chained state — the ONLY source of shipped numbers). The single account carries one joint balance, one margin pool (cap 0.9 x balance with proportional shrink), one joint stop-out (worst co-timed mark < 0.5 x margin), per-fill spread crossing + EUR3.25/lot/side FX-metal commission + engine-imported swap curves, and worst-mark DD = (peak of close equity − co-timed minute worst equity)/peak. SCORECARD/AUDIT — compute_metrics gates (CAGR>=80%, DD<30%, negY=0, negQ<=1, Sharpe>2 aspirational), then the battery: in-pin worst-mark breach bootstrap (20d blocks, 5000 paths, seed 20260709), validate_v1_4.py (10k-path bootstrap + Deflated Sharpe), walkforward_cpcv.py (quarterly min-var walk-forward + purged CPCV on the allocation), cross-feed/2026-holdout (feed_test.py, run_v1_4_1.py), 2015-19 pre-period OOS (run_oos_2015.py), stress harness (stress_lib/stress_mkt3/4/8, stress_v34). DEPLOYMENT — ea/ contains the live Python-brain + MQL5 executor stack reproducing combine + hard limits, consuming research/outputs/guards_config.json.
how_to_run: OFFICIAL v3.4 PIN (reproduces research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json + v34_s10_pin_curve.parquet): python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py — cwd-independent (hardcodes HERE). Expected runtime ~4-5 min wall on this machine (file mtimes: script 09:41 → curve 09:45:40 → json 09:45:44; same ~5 min for the s11 pin) + numba JIT compile on first run. Expected output: '[validate] v2-pin worst-mark breach = 0.0782 (target 0.061)' (NOTE: the 0.061 target matches the v2 curve's breach_CLOSE 0.0608, worst-mark prints 0.0782), then 24 per-quarter progress lines ('2020Q1: NNN,NNN min | bal EUR... | trades N'), then '=== v3.4 s10 PIN (v3 book, scale 10, 1m) ===' with CAGR +0.8866 | DDworst 0.2167 | Sharpe 1.8543 | negY 0 negQ 1 | EUR449,708, then 'C2 worst-mark breach = 0.1208 | median 0.234 p95 0.335'. Prereqs: NewStrategyFable5/cache/bars_1m_ic/*.parquet present; all 7 sleeve *_pos.parquet in research/outputs/ (rebuild any by running its sleeve module); outputs/v2_pin_curve.parquet present (used for the validation step).

v2 OFFICIAL PIN: python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/run_v2_pin.py → outputs/v2_pin_1m.json + v2_pin_curve.parquet (7 capped sleeves @ scale 9 + hard limits; CAGR +70.9%/DD 19.9%/Sharpe 1.76).

v1.1.1 1M CONFIRMATION (frozen v1 weights, scales 5/6/7): python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/run_v1_1_1.py → outputs/v1_1_1_result.json + v1_1_1_curve.parquet (curve saved at scale 6). Loads research/outputs/final_config.json (v1 frozen weights, sum 1.0, scale field 5.5 ignored by this script).

REBUILD A SLEEVE: cd /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research/sleeves && python3 <name>.py → writes ../outputs/<name>_pos.parquet + <name>_report.json and prints DEV/HOLD/FULL fast-sim metrics.
FAST SCREEN OF SHIPPED BOOK (screening only, NOT official; see pitfalls — renormalizes and skips hard limits): python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/strategy_fable.py

BOOTSTRAP + DEFLATED SHARPE BATTERY: cd /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research && python3 validate_v1_4.py → outputs/v1_4_validation.json (relative paths; reads the STALE v1_2_curve.parquet).
WALK-FORWARD + PURGED CPCV: cd /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research && python3 walkforward_cpcv.py → outputs/walkforward_cpcv.json.
BREACH-TABLE RE-DERIVATION (audit determinism check): cd /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research && python3 rederive_claimA.py.
official_numbers: v3.4 OFFICIAL (the shipped book): research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json, produced by research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py through the TRUE 1-MINUTE single cross-margined account engine (research/account_engine_1m.py, EUR10k initial, worst-mark accounting, margin_cap 0.9, rebalance_band 0.25, stop-out 0.50): CAGR +88.66% | worst-mark MaxDD 21.67% | Sharpe 1.854 | 0 negative years | 1 negative quarter (2023Q1 −1.42%) | EUR10,000 → EUR449,707.75 over 2020-2025 (5.996y) | 20,403 trades | P(maxDD>30%) worst-mark 0.121 / close-mark 0.093 (house 20d-block stationary bootstrap, 5000 paths, seed 20260709). Book = V2_CAPS 7 sleeves + mag_xau@0.05, scale 10, structural overnight-gold cap 1.80xE + 0.5xE managed-cross caps. Every shipped number in this repo comes from the 1m engine by standing method; the hourly engines are screening-only (hourly is ~7% CAGR-optimistic, DD faithful-to-conservative). Historical official pins: v2 = outputs/v2_pin_1m.json (CAGR +70.9%/DD 19.9%/Sharpe 1.76/negQ 2, scale 9); v3/C2 s11 = outputs/c2_s11_pin_1m.json (+99.9%/23.2%/1.86/negQ 2, superseded by v3.4's mechanical re-pick to s10).
pitfalls: strategy_fable.build_portfolio_positions() does NOT reproduce the official book: it RENORMALIZES weights by their sum (w/total with total=0.826 → effective scale 12.1 not 10, contradicting its own header comment 'Weights are NOT renormalized' at line 57 and the cash-park doctrine) and applies NO hard limits. The official construction is only in run_v2_pin.py / eval_v34_pin_s10.py: E.combine(sleeves, raw_weights) x SCALE then apply_hard_limits. Do not copy build_portfolio_positions into the merged repo as-is.

docs/CODE_MAP.md is stale on sleeves: says '9 sleeves / 7 shipped' and indexes only 9 modules, but research/sleeves/ holds 15 (6 later killed hunt candidates: lead_lag, session_flow, statarb from v1.3; xsec_reversion, reversion_intraday, range_fade from v1.6) and the 8th shipped seat (mag_xau) lives in research/ext_import/, not sleeves/. It also still describes v2 as the shipped book; strategy_fable.py (v3.4, scale 10) is authoritative.

validate_v1_4.py reads outputs/v1_2_curve.parquet — a v1.2-era curve, NOT the v3.4 pin. Its printed header 'book (scale 10, 1m)' refers to that old curve. Current-book breach numbers come from the worst_mark_breach embedded in the pin scripts (rederive_claimA.py procedure).

Two different CAGR floors coexist: core.compute_metrics gate cagr_ge_80 (revised 2026-07-09, DD budget 20%→30%) vs the v3.4 preregistration scale-pick rule CAGR>=85%. Both are intentional (metric gate vs pre-committed re-pick rule) but do not conflate them.

The eval pin's '[validate] ... (target 0.061)' line is misleading: 0.061 was the s9 C2 close-vs-worst bookkeeping — the v2 curve validation actually prints breach_worst 0.0782 while its breach_close is 0.0608. Reproduction matches the JSON (v2_breach_validation), not the literal 0.061.

Bar stamps are broker SERVER time (GMT+2/+3, NY-anchored; hour 0 = 17:00 ET), NOT UTC — but several older sleeve docstrings (meanrev '13:00 UTC', seasonal '23:00 UTC', trend_v2 '05:00 UTC') say UTC; the grid hours they reference are actually server hours. intraday.py has the corrected note. Trust the code, not the timezone label.

20d-block bootstrap is known-pessimistic on breach (chops recovery structure): block-length sensitivity (strategy_fable.py lines 92-98) shows scale 9's realistic breach ~14-20% with 40-60d blocks. The 0.121 v3.4 figure is under 20d blocks.

Killed things — do not resurrect without new evidence: portfolio overlays (vol targeting / dd throttle / quarter throttle) rejected on DEV; trend + xsec_fx sleeves killed; session_flow/lead_lag/statarb killed v1.3; chop sleeves (xsec_reversion, reversion_intraday, range_fade) not integrated v1.6 and xsec_reversion re-declined v3.3; regime classifier / dynamic reweighting does NOT validate OOS (docs/v1.6/RESULT.md); renormalizing freed weight doubles ceiling-breach odds (OPS-8 — always cash-park).

research/outputs/final_config.json holds the OLD v1 frozen weights (seasonal 0.2467, crypto 0.2193... sum 1.0, scale 5.5) — historical benchmark only; run_v1_*.py load it. Do not confuse with the shipped v3.4 caps.
simulate_account_1m hardcodes quarters 2020Q1-2025Q4 — extending the sample requires editing that range. Swap-rate lookups pre-2019-11 are flat-backfilled (financing approximate before that).
mag_xau is lag-fragile (lag+1d halves the edge) and is on a slippage-ledger watch; its live execution must be next-bar-open fast.

core.compute_metrics called on an equity Series without pos yields mean_abs_corr=NaN and rho_term=1 in fitness (the pin JSON's fitness 7.28 is computed that way — not comparable to fast-sim fitness values that include rho).
validate_v1_4.py and walkforward_cpcv.py must be run with cwd=research/ (relative 'outputs/...' paths); the eval/pin scripts are cwd-independent (hardcoded absolute HERE).
